chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3178 of 2024 a/w CP D 3179 and 3180/2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.14109/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 24-03-2025 Mr. Mir Moula Bux Tunio, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Fahad Hussain, Advocate for Respondents No.2 and 3. Per learned counsel the petitions impugn show cause notices, however, same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petitions may be disposed of in aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy hereof in each connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
